text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like a rising dragon, Copano Rickey soared
during her first three years in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that was only the beginning. Now she's
breaking one Japanese dirt race record after
another...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Copano Rickey has won yet another G1 race! She just keeps on soaring to unprecedented heights!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A true champion, she's still boldly carving her
incredible feng shui legend into the sand!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Tarumae! I would never have made it this
far without you!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: But you may be singing a different tune next time, because I'll be finishing first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the two pillars of dirt racing, their bond is
deeper than anyone's. And on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but tickets for the feng shui consultation
are no longer available! They're all gone!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Awww, I really wanted to talk to Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Then we'll definitely be first in line next time
tickets become available!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These days, whenever Copano Rickey hosts one
of her consultations, crowds of racers flock to her
for advice.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We should have chosen a slightly bigger venue,
huh, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I think we need space for more than just sixty
people. Next time, let's get a venue that's a bit
bigger, and book it for longer too.
choice_data_list: Sounds like a plan. Let's make it happen.
Sounds like a plan. Let's make it happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui is genuinely popular now too. It's gone
from being a passing fad to being an indelible
part of the cultural fabric.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That gets me to thinking... Copano Rickey has
achieved her two big dreams of becoming a dirt
race champion and spreading the word of feng
shui, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What does she plan to do next?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh? My... next goal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figured the only way to solve that mystery would
be to ask her myself.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, that's already settled. I can already see it
clearly.
choice_data_list: So you've found a new dream?
So you've found a new dream?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I don't know if it's new or not, but I have
my heart set on it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: My goal is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
To keep using feng shui to help make everyone a
little bit happier!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. That's it. Well, actually, that's always been
it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Spreading feng shui and becoming the dirt
champion might seem like different things, but
they're part of the same goal.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I just want to help everyone find a little spark of
joy. That's the only thing on my mind.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I know if you look through the history of feng
shui, you'll find people who wished for more than
that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Like... an aristocrat who used his knowledge to
drive his enemy out of the imperial court...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And there was this one researcher who tried to
use feng shui to further his own ambitions. But...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All those benefits are short-term. Feng shui is
about bringing a place together—about making
the environment better for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If you don't make a balanced environment where
anyone can be happy, none of it'll last.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
"Make everyone just a little bit happier than they
were yesterday." Don't you think that's enough?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And to prove that... Every day, I want to run just
a little faster than I did the day before. If I can
keep that up, then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
People will believe that no matter who they are,
they can improve their lives.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
They'll realize that building on their progress, a
little bit at a time, will lead them down the road
to happiness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dreams are meant to be huge aspirations. Some
part of me has always felt that way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Copano Rickey's dream is different. She just
wants to bring people a little bit more happiness
than they had yesterday. She wants to do
something she can be consistent with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's the whole philosophy of feng shui. It's
about building a workable future that coexists
with nature.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What's with that solemn look on your face?
choice_data_list: Nothing. It's just, I think your idea is beautiful.
Nothing. It's just, I think your idea is beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
C'monnn, you can't just throw compliments at me
out of nowhere. Everything I'm saying is pretty
down-to-earth. And I'm sure I've mentioned it all
before, haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And don't get too serious about it either. If we're
not happy and having fun while we do this, we
won't be doing it for long. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's better. Now, come on. Help me get ready!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I won't just be doing a run-of-the-mill feng shui
consultation—there's something I want to show
everyone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Copano Rickey's feng shui
consultation, and the main event has just
finished...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone! Now that the consultation's
over, it's time for the concert! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I want you all to have a total blast today so you
can be even happier tomorrow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Now... start the music!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Copano Rickey's song starts playing. And then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Do the things you love to do!
Try out things you never knew! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All it takes is a little feng shui
To brighten up everybody's days! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Keep runnin' and they'll get you Your feelings will get through, woohoo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Go, Rickey! ♪ Like Rickey! ♪ Go like Rickey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Go, Rickey! ♪ Like Rickey! ♪ Go like Rickey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Go, Rickey! ♪ Like, Rickey! ♪ Go like Rickey! ♪
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey boasts both the astonishing
power of feng shui and a singular glow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She runs with a natural charisma in a way only she
can, and never stops aiming for just a little more
happiness.
